title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
script: <script src='https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/view-image.js@2.0.0/view-image.min.js'></script><script src='//busuanzi.ibruce.info/busuanzi/2.3/busuanzi.pure.mini.js'></script><script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){var s=document.createElement('style');s.innerHTML='@keyframes fluid{0%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}100%{background-position:0% 50%}}html,body{width:100%;height:100%;margin:0;padding:0;overflow-x:hidden}body{background:linear-gradient(300deg,#ff0000,#ff7f00,#ffff00,#00ff00,#00ffff,#0000ff,#8b00ff)!important;background-size:1400% 1400%!important;animation:fluid 15s ease infinite!important;background-attachment:fixed!important}.markdown-body,.FileList,.side{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.9)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);border-radius:15px;box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);padding:20px!important;margin-bottom:20px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5)}.Header{background:transparent!important;border:none!important}.footer{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.6)!important;border-radius:10px}#my-sidebar{position:fixed;left:10px;top:10px;bottom:10px;width:240px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.95);border-radius:12px;padding:15px;z-index:9999;box-shadow:5px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:2px solid #fff;transition:transform 0.3s}#search-bar{width:100%;padding:10px;margin-bottom:15px;border:2px solid #eee;border-radius:8px;outline:none}#search-bar:focus{border-color:#00c6ff}.nav-label{font-weight:bold;margin:15px 0 5px;color:#333;background:#f0f0f0;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:5px}.nav-item{display:block;padding:8px 10px;color:#555;text-decoration:none;border-bottom:1px solid #f9f9f9;font-size:14px;transition:0.2s}.nav-item:hover{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#00c6ff,#0072ff);color:#fff;border-radius:5px;transform:translateX(5px)}@media(min-width:1300px){.markdown-body,.FileList{margin-left:260px}}@media(max-width:1299px){#my-sidebar{transform:translateX(-260px)}#my-sidebar.open{transform:translateX(0)}#menu-btn{display:block!important}}#menu-btn{display:none;position:fixed;left:10px;bottom:10px;z-index:10000;background:#0072ff;color:white;padding:10px 15px;border-radius:50px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)}';document.head.appendChild(s);var btn=document.createElement('div');btn.id='menu-btn';btn.innerText='☰ 目录';btn.onclick=function(){var sb=document.getElementById('my-sidebar');sb.classList.toggle('open')};document.body.appendChild(btn);window.ViewImage&&ViewImage.init('.markdown-body img');fetch('/blogBase.json').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{var b=document.createElement('div');b.id='my-sidebar';var i=document.createElement('input');i.id='search-bar';i.placeholder='🔍 搜索...';i.oninput=function(e){var v=e.target.value.toLowerCase();b.querySelectorAll('.nav-item').forEach(l=>{l.style.display=l.innerText.toLowerCase().includes(v)?'block':'none'})};b.appendChild(i);var map={};Object.values(d).forEach(p=>{var l=p.labels[0]||'未分类';if(!map[l])map[l]=[];map[l].push(p)});Object.keys(map).sort().forEach(k=>{var t=document.createElement('div');t.className='nav-label';t.innerText=k;b.appendChild(t);map[k].forEach(p=>{var a=document.createElement('a');a.className='nav-item';a.href=p.postUrl;a.innerText=p.postTitle;b.appendChild(a)})});document.body.appendChild(b)}).catch(e=>console.log(e));});</script>
